footer.tagline: Business setup orientation for founders in Germany.

home.title: Start a business in Germany — planned in 5 minutes
home.subtitle: Answer a few questions and get clear next steps — no signup required.

trust.heading: What you'll get
trust.item1Desc: The right business form for your situation — sole proprietorship, GmbH, UG, or freelance.
trust.item2Desc: Which authorities, what order, which documents. Specific and step-by-step.
trust.item3Desc: The tax and legal obligations you need to know as a founder — without legal jargon.
